source: Contemporary manuals recommended bleeding, blistering, and a diet of thin gruel[3-5], and the physicians who followed them were neither stupid nor careless. They were reasoning from a theory of balance that had survived seventeen centuries of testing by men as observant as themselves, and the theory explained a great deal: why fevers broke, why the young recovered and the old did not, why a patient bled at the nose and then improved. What it could not explain, it absorbed. That is the property of a theory that has stopped being a hypothesis and become a way of seeing.

expect.why: A bracketed range of endnote numbers is visual sourcing.

traps.span: why a patient bled at the nose
traps.label: example-must-stay

What it could not explain, it absorbed. That is the property of a theory that has stopped being a hypothesis and become a way of seeing.
notes: A range marker whose internal hyphen invites a model to read it as a compound word or a date span. The comma that follows must survive, so the deletion has to close up without swallowing it.
